case.example_en: I have a pencil case on my desk.
case.example_zh: 我的课桌上有一个铅笔盒。

club.example_en: I join an English club after school.
club.example_zh: 我放学后参加英语社团。

book.example_en: I was reading a book in my study.

email.example_en: I'm glad to receive your email.

fact.example_en: We learn a new fact in class every day.
fact.example_zh: 我们每天在课堂上学一个新知识点。

level.example_en: I have some doubt about math at this level.
level.example_zh: 我对这个水平的数学有点疑问。

form.example_en: We fill in a form at the start of class.
form.example_zh: 我们上课开始时填一张表。

doubt.example_en: I have some doubt about this math problem.
doubt.example_zh: 我对这道数学题有点疑问。

math.example_en: We read the news and study math in class.
math.example_zh: 我们在课上读新闻并学数学。

news.example_en: We read the news at the start of class.
news.example_zh: 我们上课开始时读新闻。

group.example_en: Our group can help each other after class.
group.example_zh: 我们小组下课后可以互相帮助。

idea.example_en: You need a key idea for the exam.
idea.example_zh: 考试你需要一个关键想法。

mind.example_en: Keep your mind on the paper.

need.example_en: You need to know the key idea for the exam.
need.example_zh: 你需要知道考试的关键想法。

role.example_en: Know your role in the group work.
role.example_zh: 要知道你在小组作业中的角色。

limit.example_en: There is a time limit in the exam.

key.example_en: You need the key idea for the exam.
key.example_zh: 你需要考试的关键想法。

real.example_en: This part of the paper feels real hard.

quiet.example_en: The teacher wants us to be quiet.

score.example_en: Follow the rule and you may get a good score.
score.example_zh: 遵守规则，你可能会得高分。

paper.example_en: Keep your mind on the paper.

rule.example_en: Follow the rule and you may get a good score.
rule.example_zh: 遵守规则，你可能会得高分。

part.example_en: This part of the paper feels real hard.

shape.example_en: The shape of her work looks nice.

term.example_en: My friend got a prize for a good mark this term.
term.example_zh: 我朋友这学期因分数好得了奖。

proof.example_en: She can print the proof on paper.
proof.example_zh: 她可以把证明打印在纸上。

mark.example_en: My friend got a good mark this term.
mark.example_zh: 我朋友这学期得了好分数。

print.example_en: She can print the proof on paper.
print.example_zh: 她可以把证明打印在纸上。

prize.example_en: My friend got a prize for a good mark.
prize.example_zh: 我朋友因好分数得了奖。

fair.example_en: The title of our work should be fair to all.
fair.example_zh: 我们作业的标题应对所有人公平。

topic.example_en: Our task is about a new topic this week.
topic.example_zh: 我们本周的任务是一个新话题。

note.example_en: I use a ruler and write a note in my book.
note.example_zh: 我用尺子并在书里做笔记。

ruler.example_en: I use a ruler to draw a line in my book.

task.example_en: Our task is about a new topic this week.
task.example_zh: 我们本周的任务是一个新话题。

title.example_en: The title of our work should be fair to all.
title.example_zh: 我们作业的标题应对所有人公平。

add.example_en: I add a note once a day.

ask.example_en: I ask the teacher to help me use the new word.
ask.example_zh: 我请老师帮我用这个新词。

june.example_en: The library is open in June.

once.example_en: I add a note once a day.

use.example_en: I ask the teacher to help me use the new word.
use.example_zh: 我请老师帮我用这个新词。

word.example_en: I ask the teacher to help me use the new word.
word.example_zh: 我请老师帮我用这个新词。

new.example_en: We meet in class and keep a new list of names.
new.example_zh: 我们在课堂见面，保存一份新的姓名名单。

plan.example_en: Our plan is to learn five words each day.
plan.example_zh: 我们计划每天学五个单词。

meet.example_en: We meet in class every morning.
meet.example_zh: 我们每天早上在课堂见面。

list.example_en: We keep a new list of names in class.
list.example_zh: 我们在课堂保存一份新的姓名名单。

name.example_en: I write my name on the list first.
name.example_zh: 我先在名单上写下自己的名字。

keep.example_en: We keep a new list of names in class.
keep.example_zh: 我们在课堂保存一份新的姓名名单。

pick.example_en: Let me help you pick the right book.

help.example_en: Let me help you pick the right book.

know.example_en: I know you can pass the test.

pass.example_en: I know you can pass the test.

let.example_en: Let me help you pick the right book.

look.example_en: Look at the book and say the word out.

say.example_en: Look at the book and say the word out.

try.example_en: Try again if you make a mistake.

tell.example_en: Tell me when you need help.
